What happens when a hardware watchpoint is programmed for a data address range and halting is allowed with EDSCR.HDE set to 1?
gold_answers: hardware breakpoints and watchpoints cause entry to Debug state instead of causing debug exceptions. In Debug state, the PE is halted.

items.question: What is the preferred return address for a Software Step exception compared to other exception-generating instructions like SVC?
gold_answers: The preferred return address is the address of the breakpoint instruction, not the next instruction.

items.question: How can a debugger configure watchpoints and breakpoints so that a Breakpoint debug event is only generated when both a watchpoint and a breakpoint match, considering the specific registers for watchpoints?
gold_answers: A debugger can link a breakpoint that is programmed with an address and a breakpoint that is programmed with anything other than an address together, so that a Breakpoint debug event is only generated if both breakpoints match.

items.question: What are the conditions describing the PE state and configuration when the implementation includes ARMv8.1-VHE and EL2 uses AArch64 with HCR_EL2.E2H set to 1?
gold_answers: • The implementation includes ARMv8.1-VHE. • The PE is in Non-secure state. • EL2 using AArch64 and HCR_EL2.E2H is set to 1. • The PE is executing at EL0 and HCR_EL2.TGE is 1, or the PE is executing at EL2.

items.question: What conditions related to data address and Context ID matches can trigger this breakpoint, as described across pages D2-1926 and D2-1927?
gold_answers: — A successful data address match, defined by a Linked watchpoint that links to this breakpoint, see Watchpoint data address comparisons on page D2-1944. — A successful Context ID match defined by this breakpoint, as described in Breakpoint context comparisons on page D2-1934.

items.question: Where does the PE record information about a Breakpoint exception?
gold_answers: Information about the exception in the Exception Syndrome Register (ESR) at the Exception level the exception is taken to.
